scripts.spec:download: mkdir -p spec && curl -L 'https://documenter.gw.postman.com/api/collections/765844/UV5RnfwM?environment=765844-a726906e-f1b7-4919-83d5-e740cd155ddb&segregateAuth=true&versionTag=latest' -o /tmp/bluebubbles.postman.json && tsx scripts/prepare_postman.ts /tmp/bluebubbles.postman.json && npx postman-to-openapi -s /tmp/bluebubbles.postman.json -o spec/openapi.yaml
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc-alias -p tsconfig.json
scripts.release:publish: npm run build && npx changeset publish --access public
scripts.docs:dev: npm run docs:sync-openapi && cd docs && mint dev --no-open
scripts.docs:validate: npm run docs:sync-openapi && cd docs && mint validate
